steps.name: Tools_Set Context Value

parallelActions.name: Siemplify_Change Alert Priority
parallelActions.description: Automatically change the alert priority to the given input. Note: This action is compatible only with Siemplify version 5.6 and higher.

parallelActions.name: Siemplify_Change Priority
parallelActions.description: Automatically change case priority to the given input

parallelActions.name: Siemplify_Set Case SLA
parallelActions.description: Set the SLA for a case. This action has the highest priority and it will override the existing SLA defined for the specific case.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"SLA Period":"8","SLA Time Unit":"Hours","SLA Time To Critical Period":"7","SLA Time To Critical Unit":"Hours"}

parallelActions.name: Tools_Change Case Name
parallelActions.description: The action changes the case's name (title)

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"New Name":"Feed -  [Event.detection_detectionFields_feedname]  not reporting","Only If First Alert":false}

parallelActions.instanceName: Execute UDM query against feed name
parallelActions.name: GoogleChronicle_Execute UDM Query
parallelActions.description: Execute custom UDM query in Google Chronicle. Note: 120 action executions are allowed per hour. Aggregated queries are supported only via Chronicle API configuration of integration.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value:
{"Query":"metadata.log_type = "[Event.detection_detectionFields_log_type]"
AND metadata.ingestion_labels.key = "feedname"
AND metadata.ingestion_labels.value = "[Event.detection_detectionFields_feedname]"
","Time Frame":"Custom","Start Time":"[Calculates time window from GCP Monitoring alert timestamp.ScriptResult]Z","End Time":"","Max Results To Return":"50"}

parallelActions.name: GoogleChronicle_Is Value In Data Table
parallelActions.description: Check, if provided values are found in the data table in Google SecOps. Note: this action only works with Chronicle API authentication. Backstory API is not supported.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Data Table Name":"det172270_feedname_watchlist_manual\r","Column":"feedid","Values":"[Event.detection_detectionFields_feedid]","Case Insensitive Search":true,"Max Data Table Rows To Return":"1"}

parallelActions.instanceName: Execute UDM query against ingestion source
parallelActions.name: GoogleChronicle_Execute UDM Query
parallelActions.description: Execute custom UDM query in Google Chronicle. Note: 120 action executions are allowed per hour. Aggregated queries are supported only via Chronicle API configuration of integration.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value:
{"Query":"metadata.log_type = "[Event.detection_detectionFields_log_type]"
AND metadata.ingestion_labels.key = "ingestion_source"
AND metadata.ingestion_labels.value = "[Event.event_securityResult_detectionFields_Ingestion_Source]"
","Time Frame":"Custom","Start Time":"[Calculates time window from GCP Monitoring alert timestamp.ScriptResult]Z","End Time":"","Max Results To Return":"50"}

parallelActions.name: GoogleChronicle_Execute UDM Query
parallelActions.description: Execute custom UDM query in Google Chronicle. Note: 120 action executions are allowed per hour. Aggregated queries are supported only via Chronicle API configuration of integration.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Query":"metadata.log_type = \"[Event.detection_detectionFields_log_type]\"\r\nAND metadata.ingestion_labels.key = \"ingestion_source\"\r\nAND metadata.ingestion_labels.value = \"[Event.event_securityResult_detectionFields_Ingestion_Source]\"\r","Time Frame":"Custom","Start Time":"[Calculates time window from GCP Monitoring alert timestamp.ScriptResult]Z","End Time":"","Max Results To Return":"50"}

parallelActions.description: Check, if provided values are found in the data table in Google SecOps. Note: this action only works with Chronicle API authentication. Backstory API is not supported.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Data Table Name":"det172270_connector_watchlist_manual","Column":"ingestion_source","Values":"[Event.event_securityResult_detectionFields_Ingestion_Source]","Case Insensitive Search":true,"Max Data Table Rows To Return":"1000"}

parameters.name: Branches
parameters.value: [{"LogicalOperator":1,"Conditions":[{"Operator":3,"FieldName":"[Execute UDM query against log type.JsonResult| \"events.name\" | count()]","Type":7,"Value":"0","CustomOperatorName":null},{"Operator":3,"FieldName":"[Execute UDM query against feed name.JsonResult| \"events.name\" | count()]","Type":7,"Value":"0","CustomOperatorName":null},{"Operator":3,"FieldName":"[Execute UDM query against ingestion source.JsonResult| \"events.name\" | count()]","Type":7,"Value":"0","CustomOperatorName":null},{"Operator":3,"FieldName":"[Execute UDM query against connector.JsonResult| \"events.name\" | count()]","Type":7,"Value":"0","CustomOperatorName":null}],"Order":1,"IsDefaultBranch":false,"Name":"Asset running"},{"LogicalOperator":0,"Conditions":[],"Order":2,"IsDefaultBranch":true,"Name":"Branch"}]

steps.name: Siemplify_Close Case
steps.description: Closes the case the current alert has been grouped to

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Reason":"Maintenance","Root Cause":"True Negative - Normal Operation","Comment":"The asset is now running. "}

steps.name: Siemplify_Case Comment
steps.description: Add a comment to the case the current alert has been grouped to

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value:
{"Comment":"Classification: Critical =[Event.detection_1_variables_critical_outcome_value]  / PCI = [Event.detection_1_variables_pci_outcome_value]
Time Window: [Event.detection_detectionFields_timewindow]
Log Type:  [Event.event_extracted_incident.resource.labels.log_type]
Monitoring Feed Name: [Event.detection_detectionFields_feedname]
Ingestion Source: [Event.event_securityResult_detectionFields_Ingestion_Source] 
Connector: [Event.event_extracted_incident.resource.labels.log_type]
Cloud Monitoring Description: [Event.event_securityResult_1_description]
GCP Cloud Monitoring Alert:[Event.event_securityResult_1_urlBackToProduct] "}

steps.instanceName: Calculates time window from GCP Monitoring alert timestamp
steps.name: Functions_Convert Time Format
steps.description:
Convert a datetime value from one format to another format.  
For GCP_MONITORING_ALERTS_CUSTOM change From Format to %Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%fZ

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Input":"[Event.event_metadata_eventTimestamp]\n","From Format":"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ","To Format":"YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss","Time Delta In Seconds":"[Converts data table time window value to negative seconds.ScriptResult]\n","Timezone":"UTC"}
